{{Infobox character
| name = Cryce
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cryce]]'s energy faded and she blinked back tears.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Cryce]] is a doctor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Cryce]] and her team prepare a drone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Cryce]] is a character who aggressively slid over to shove [[Mell]] aside.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
